headingHighlighter.title: Heading Highlighter
headingHighlighter.select_tag_warning: Select at least one heading tag
headingHighlighter.no_headings_error: No headings found on this page

headings.title: Page Headings
headings.none_found: No headings found on this page

performance.title: Page Performance
performance.fcp_desc: Time when the first text or image is painted
performance.lcp_desc: Time when the largest content element becomes visible
performance.cls_desc: Measures visual stability — unexpected layout shifts
performance.tbt_desc: Sum of time the page was unresponsive (long tasks)
performance.dns_lookup_desc: Time to resolve the domain name
performance.tcp_connect_desc: Time to establish TCP connection to server
performance.dom_interactive_desc: When the browser finished parsing HTML and DOM is ready
performance.dom_content_loaded_desc: When all deferred scripts have executed
performance.dom_complete_desc: When the page and all resources have finished loading
performance.score_desc: Overall Lighthouse score — weighted aggregate of all metrics
performance.inp_desc: Responsiveness to user interactions — Core Web Vital since 2024
performance.ttfb_desc: Server response time — affects crawl speed and ranking
performance.tti_desc: When the page becomes fully interactive for the user
performance.speed_index_desc: How quickly page content is visually displayed
performance.local_source_note: This URL is not publicly accessible. Metrics are measured locally in your browser and may differ from Google's data.
performance.error_rate_limit: PageSpeed API rate limit reached. Try again in a minute or add an API key in settings.
performance.error_api: PageSpeed API returned an error. The page may be unavailable or blocked.
performance.error_blocked_domain: This site cannot be analyzed by PageSpeed API — it blocks automated requests.

opp.uses-long-cache-ttl: Serve static assets with efficient cache policy
opp.efficient-animated-content: Use video formats for animated content
opp.third-party-summary: Reduce the impact of third-party code
opp.font-display: Ensure text remains visible during webfont load

schema.title: Schema Markup
schema.not_available: Schema analysis is not available on this page
schema.not_found: No Schema Markup found on this page
schema.parse_error: JSON parse error — see raw source below

msg.invalid_url: Value must be a valid URL (https://...)
msg.invalid_date: Value must be a valid ISO 8601 date

og.title: Social Preview
og.not_available: Social preview analysis is not available on this page
og.not_found: No Open Graph or social meta tags found

msg.url_mismatch: og:url does not match the canonical URL
msg.image_below_recommended: Below recommended size for large preview ({{ w }}×{{ h }}px)
msg.image_aspect_ratio: Aspect ratio {{ ratio }}:1 — may be cropped (expected ~1.91:1)

simulator.title: Link Preview Simulator
simulator.disclaimer: Approximate preview — platforms may render differently

content.title: Content Analysis
content.mode_full_tip: Analyses all visible text on the page, including navigation, footer and sidebars
content.mode_main_tip: Analyses only the main article/content area, excluding navigation, footer and sidebars
content.fallback_warning: No semantic block found (main, article) — fix: wrap page content in <main> or <article>
content.low_confidence_warning: Text is too short for reliable readability scores

metrics.total_words_tip: Number of word tokens after splitting by Unicode word boundaries
metrics.unique_words_tip: Number of distinct words after lowercasing (no stemming in MVP)
metrics.stop_words_count_tip: Words matching the combined multilingual stop-word list (en, ru, es, uk)
metrics.water_tip: Share of tokens that carry no meaningful content: stop words, single-character tokens, and numbers
metrics.readability_tip: Flesch Reading Ease (Rudolf Flesch, 1948). Score 0–100, higher = easier to read. Calibrated for English.
metrics.chars_tip: Total characters excluding whitespace and line breaks
metrics.flesch_kincaid_tip: Grade level estimate: 0.39 × (words/sentences) + 11.8 × (syllables/words) − 15.59. For Cyrillic text syllables are approximated by vowel count (approx)
metrics.gunning_fog_tip: Readability index: 0.4 × [(words/sentences) + 100 × (complex words/words)]. Complex words have 3+ syllables. For Cyrillic text syllables are approximated (approx)
